my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21's stricter serialization rules.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: Java 21 introduces a new compiler warning (and potential error depending on configuration) for serialVersionUID fields not annotated with @Serial, as part of the 'Serial' annotation feature to prevent accidental serialization of non-serializable fields or incorrect serialVersionUID values.
